## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Strategy logic change
- [ ] Backtester logic change
- [ ] Portfolio/PnL logic change
- [ ] Data handling change
- [ ] UI/Streamlit change
- [ ] Tooling/configuration change

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] Signals remain in -1/0/1 contract where relevant
- [ ] No look-ahead bias introduced
- [ ] Final equity reconciles with cumulative net PnL
- [ ] Lint passed: ruff check
- [ ] Type check passed: mypy
- [ ] Tests passed: pytest
- [ ] Docs/configs updated if behavior changed

## Risks and Mitigation

List potential impact and mitigations.

## Evidence

Include key command outputs, metrics, screenshots, or charts.
